column1: # Group II (suppressed granulocytopoiesis: myelosan pre-treatment + "Эфа-2" 8330 mg/kg)
# Myelosan protocol: 10 mg/day for 5-7 days + 4 mg/day for 8 days (Boyarchuk commentary).
# Effect: ~40-50% reduction in peripheral neutrophils before "Эфа-2" challenge.
# All hemostatic and neutrophil-activity columns are DELTAS from baseline (t=0).
# Neutrophil count is ABSOLUTE (10^9/L). Note: baseline N already suppressed (3.9 vs 7.3 in G1).
# Significant portion of G2 data is unpublished — see archive/v12/README.md and PROVENANCE.md.
